phase_name: Arts & Health Extension — review writeup type

completed_tasks.name: Convert else: to elif for normal writeup, add review elif branch with tiered context
Fix test patchability: add top-level try/except import of perform_review_writeup

remaining_tasks.name: Commit: git add launch_proposal_writer.py tests/test_launch_proposal_writer.py && commit

decisions.decision: Top-level try/except import of perform_review_writeup at module level
decisions.rationale: patch('launch_proposal_writer.perform_review_writeup') requires the name to exist at module scope; local elif-block import is not patchable that way

next_action: git add launch_proposal_writer.py tests/test_launch_proposal_writer.py && git commit -m 'feat: add --writeup-type review to launch_proposal_writer.py'
context_notes: 94/94 tests pass. The one failing test needed perform_review_writeup imported at module level (try/except) so the mock patch target exists. The local import inside the elif block was removed; the module-level name is used directly. Also blank_review_latex/ and template.tex/perform_icbinb_writeup.py are modified but were NOT part of this task — do not include them in this commit.
